items.title: Kingston locals prepare for intensifying Hurricane Melissa | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Fishermen and market vendors in Kingston secured boats and stocked up on essentials amid a tropical storm that intensified into a hurricane, the U.S. National Hurricane Center said.

items.title: US warships deployed, Canada talks, World Series and love after war in Ivory Coast
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>U.S. President Donald Trump departs on an Asia trip, hoping for a deal with China. The U.S. escalates its military presence in the Caribbean. Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney says he's ready to resume trade talks, but Trump refuses to meet - while the Toronto Blue Jays face the Los Angeles Dodgers in the World Series. And as Ivory Coast voters head to the polls, peace activists are hoping "reconciliation marriages" can bring divided communities together.



Listen to our latest episode of On Assignment (https://www.reuters.com/podcasts/syrias-hidden-graves-2025-10-25/) , where our reporters uncover a secret mass grave in Syria and the operation to move thousands of bodies across the desert to cover up years of atrocities.



Sign up for the Reuters Econ World newsletter here (https://www.reuters.com/newsletters/reuters-econ-world/) .

items.title: Native planting brings California wildlife crossing closer
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A new stage in the construction of a wildlife crossing over a Southern California highway began with the planting of the first native plants grown from seeds gathered from the area.
 
#california #wildlife #highway #animal</article>

items.title: Wall Street notches record closing highs on cool inflation | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Cooler-than-expected inflation data and upbeat corporate earnings lifted all three major US stock indexes to record closing highs, setting the stage for next week's earnings reports and an expected interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #unitedstates #stockmarket #usstocks #nasdaq #dowjones #sp500

items.title: Tracing Spain's recovery a year after deadly floods
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Disastrous images of mud-filled streets, piled up cars and devastated towns in Valencia are now replaced with a sense of normality and reconstruction, almost one year after devastating floods in Spain that killed nearly 240 people.  
 
#Valencia #Flood #Spain #Reconstruction #Disaster

items.title: White House demolition sparks criticism
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump’s “virtually unprecedented” decision to demolish the East Wing of the White House sidesteps mandated consultations and breaks with centuries of presidential norms, an expert on historic preservation law told Reuters October 23. Reporter Jeff Mason explains the situation.
 
#Trump #WhiteHouse #Demolition #UnitedStates #Politics
